name: Check `n Go
description_short: Check `n Go at 817 Southmore Ave Suite 100 G, Pasadena, TX 77502 in the Warren Acres neighborhood is Mon-Fri 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 5.0 stars across 743 reviews. Call +1 713-534-0004.
description_long:
Check 'n Go is an established payday and installment lender operating physical locations, including their East Jefferson Avenue branch in Detroit, Michigan. The company specializes in short-term emergency cash solutions designed to help consumers cover unexpected expenses, utility bills, or bridge gaps until their next payday. Their Detroit location operates Monday–Friday 10am–6pm and Saturday 10am–2pm, with a phone line available at (313) 331-5500.

The company's primary offerings include payday loans (short-term loans repaid by the next payday) and installment loans, along with Netspend prepaid Mastercard accounts for customers seeking alternative banking solutions. Their application process is streamlined: applicants provide proof of income, a valid government-issued photo ID, proof of an active checking account (30+ days old), and a working phone number. Approval decisions are provided after underwriting, and funding typically arrives the same business day for in-store applications or the next business day for online applications.

Check 'n Go distinguishes itself through strong local customer satisfaction—their Detroit location holds a 5.0-star rating with 1,021 Google reviews praising staff responsiveness and service quality. The company advertises no-cost extended payment plans as a potential alternative to standard payday loan terms, though specific details require contacting the store directly. They accept multiple application channels (online, in-store, phone where available) and provide eSignature loan finalization for convenience.

As a traditional payday lender, Check 'n Go serves consumers facing genuine emergency cash needs but operates in a product category with inherently high APRs and short repayment windows. Prospective borrowers should carefully review loan terms and fees before accepting, as payday loans are not optimal long-term financial solutions. The company does not guarantee approval for applicants with bad or no credit, though they state credit is only one factor in underwriting.
address: 817 Southmore Ave Suite 100 G, Pasadena, TX 77502

company_info.headquarters: 817 Southmore Ave Suite 100 G, Pasadena, TX 77502

pros: Same-day funding available for in-store applications, next-business-day for online
Exceptional customer reviews (5.0 stars, 1,021 Google reviews) specifically praising staff quality and service speed
Multiple application channels: online, in-store, and phone (where available)
No-cost extended payment plans may be available to reduce repayment burden
Quick application process (described as 'in minutes') with eSignature loan finalization
Accepts Matricula Consular card as alternative ID for underserved populations
Physical location provides in-person consultation and same-day funding certainty
cons: Payday loans carry high APRs typical of the industry; specific rates not disclosed on website
Requires active checking account (30+ days old), limiting access for newly banked or unbanked consumers
Short repayment window creates risk of debt cycle if customer cannot repay by next payday
Company unable to advise on credit impact; hard inquiry may lower credit scores
Website was down for maintenance at time of review, limiting ability to check current rates and terms online
best_for: Salaried or hourly employees facing unexpected expenses who can repay within one payday cycle
Consumers with active checking accounts who need same-day emergency cash locally in Detroit
Borrowers without traditional bank access seeking prepaid card services alongside short-term loans
Workers requiring fast funding with minimal documentation and same-day approval
diagnosis: Check 'n Go is best for salaried or hourly workers in the Detroit area with active checking accounts who face genuine one-time emergencies and can repay within one payday cycle. The main caveat is that payday loans carry high APRs and short repayment windows; borrowers unable to repay on time risk entering a debt cycle. Consider this option only after exhausting lower-cost alternatives like personal loans, employer advances, or credit union PALs.
services: Payday loans (short-term, repaid by next payday)
No-cost extended payment plans (terms vary, contact store)
Netspend Prepaid Mastercard (reloadable, bill payment and shopping)
